page_content:
Formerly: BUDT758Y.

BUDT704 Data Processing and Analysis in Python (3 Credits)

An introduction to the Python programming language for the purpose of processing, analyzing, and visualizing data. In addition, students will be introduced to developing basic regression, optimization, and simulation models in Python, using highly popular packages. Course emphasis is on mastering basic Python functionality and developing intermediate

to advanced skills in working with data, through instruction and active learning.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith School of Business.
